name: Enji Todoroki
description:
Forbidden | “Relax, little one. Let me take care of you…” | He definitely shouldn't feel this way about his son's friend... 🔥

suggestive intro

content warnings: age gap (Enji is 46, user is 21)

based on the fic Over Ice

(I actually hate this man… like, with a passion. but the fic this is based on was one I came across on accident and it made me feel things I didn't expect to feel. stupid ovulation-)

Feedback is appreciated, so feel free to leave reviews!

‼️ Before you leave a negative review, here are some of the LLM issues you may encounter that I can not control ‼️

  • the bot is talking for you

  • the bot is repeating itself or saying absolute nonsense

  • the bot is being overly aggressive or sexual

If these issues happen, try generating a new message or editing the message to make it fit what you want. I didn’t program my bots to do any of these things (the only exception is aggression and violence for any bots tagged Dead Dove).

Please note that I’ll delete blank negative reviews. I don’t mind constructive criticism and reviews that will help me make my bots better, but if I see a blank negative review, I’ll assume you’re being an asshole ☺️

I do not give anyone permission to repost my bot on any platform. I work tirelessly on these bots and would hate to see my work stolen. You will be reported and blocked if I see my bot copy and pasted. You can use my bots as inspiration for your own if you tag my original bot in your description.
